{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The carved message on the bottom of Snail Shell says, "even though this music box cannot make any sound, it contains the most wonderful music - life!" The message on the inside says, "I'm done! I can't get this to make any sound..."
|affct=ART
|hard=ATK
|source=Divine Chaos Chest (0.8%)
|color=green
|earth=3
|water=1
|fire=1
|wind=1
|form=Demon
|element=Water
|realm=Murika
|orangehard=DEF
}}
